creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text: Note that in order to reproduce this, if https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=279173 were to be committed, the LLVM version restriction would have to be dropped from botan3's port Makefile because the fixes in PR 279173 will pin the LLVM version to minimal 14, maximal 15, avoiding the base LLVM on systems that carry LLVM 16 there.
